About Application and Process

1812- What is TUBITAK Investment-Based Entrepreneurship Support Program?

It is a grant fund that supports the activities of entrepreneurs from the idea stage to the market so that entrepreneurs can transform their technology and innovation-oriented business ideas into enterprises with high potential to create added value and qualified employment.

Seal of Excellence What is the total budget within the scope of the support?

The maximum amount of entrepreneurship project support is 900,000 (nine hundred thousand) TL. If the business plan is found suitable for support, it will be transferred to the organization as an investment in return for a 3% share with TÜBİTAK BIGG Fund.

Who Can Apply?

Students/graduates enrolled in any associate degree, undergraduate program of universities,

Students/graduates enrolled in any master's or doctoral program of universities can apply.

Who Cannot Apply?

Those who have previously received support within the scope of the Ministry of Science, Industry and Technology Techno-Entrepreneurship Capital Support or TUBITAK 1512 or 1812 Programs 2nd Phase,

Individuals and company owners who are in the partnership structure of any company at the time of application cannot apply.
